description: A vertical graphic. The upper portion is a photograph of an officer seen from behind in a dark windbreaker lettered POLICE ERO with a Homeland Security patch, standing in a doorway while several seated men wait in a room in the background. A Department of Homeland Security seal and the words U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services appear at the top right. A dark red panel below holds white text reading Protecting Our Communities. Enforcing the Law. We remove dangerous criminal aliens to keep Americans safe.
notable_text: POLICE ERO; U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; Protecting Our Communities. Enforcing the Law.; We remove dangerous criminal aliens to keep Americans safe.
